示
罗
National Standard of the People s Republic of China
GB 19044一2022
Replace GB 19043一2013,GB 19044一2013,GB 19415一2013,GB 29142一2012,GB 29144一2012
Minimum allowable values of energy
efficiency and energy efficiency grades
of fluorescent lamps for general
lighting
普通照明用荧光灯能效限定值及能效
等级

lssued by State Administration for Market Regulation
Standardization Administration
